name: platform-assessment
description: Platform engineering assessment suite: ASDLC maturity scoring (8-path x 5-level rubric), platform ROI scorecard, org design advisor, security & agent-governance playbook, industry benchmarking brief, IDP-to-ADP reference architecture, and evidence-backed reporting visuals (quadrant, value radar, path coverage) with explicit confidence tiers. Evidence-first: collects proof via first-party MCP connectors (GitHub, Azure DevOps, Atlassian, Work IQ, cloud providers) rather than self-report.
